title: ReversibleCrafting
description: Turn items back into resources with ease!
body:
### Donation - [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/c/ArthropodR)

## Description
ReversibleCrafting – Need resources? Simply use /rvc gui to reverse craft items! Turn that old axe into sticks and iron, and never waste materials again. Perfect for any Minecraft world!

## Features
Plug and Play: Simply download and place the .jar file in your plugins folder, and you're ready to go!

Simplesim: Just type /rvc gui, drop in your items, and get them reverse crafted instantly! ✨

## Documentation

ReversibleCrafting – Turn items back into resources with ease!

🔧 Use /rvc gui to open the reverse crafting menu.

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4bb3af85ba37dde59ebd74e0d6d83fa47b56773.png)

🪓 Place an item like a Diamond Axe into the GUI.

![2](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1289950260009111574/1331658882464088116/2025-01-22_22.12.40.png?ex=67b0153a&is=67aec3ba&hm=e504e9a707f38096a64e6b994415e851f0ced959b3694f47cf9bc28524c55f49&=&format=webp&quality=lossless))

✨ Get the original materials back instantly!

![3](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1289950260009111574/1331658882690322452/2025-01-22_22.12.48.png?ex=67926b7a&is=679119fa&hm=bfb87bddc0b9d9f7f7a083dbb0a4836feb79d12cd28e932faeffc43472fc0155&=&format=webp&quality=lossless)
